channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Resolv Labs Stablecoin Depegs, Plunges 74% After $25M Exploit
item.description: A compromised key enabled an attacker to illegally mint 80 million USR tokens, causing the stablecoin to lose its dollar peg.

item.title: Bitcoin retreats to $68,000, leaving CME gap as traders eye $70,000 rebound
item.description: BTC slipped back into February's range after Donald Trump threatened to attack Iran's power plants, sparking a selloff and shifting flows toward commodities.

item.title: Bitcoin clings to monthly gains, historic losing streak still in play
item.description: Bitcoin shows early signs of outperformance against gold, with the BTC gold ratio rebounding toward 16 ounces after a steep cycle drawdown.

item.title: Gold bear market and sub-$50K BTC: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders kept sub-$50,000 BTC price targets in play as gold entered a bear market over Iran and oil-supply instability.

item.title: Bitcoin's momentum indicator is flashing a signal that should worry bulls
item.description: A key momentum indicator that has been accurate at calling price selloffs since October just triggered.

item.title: ZachXBT says fake X accounts used viral war content to drive crypto scams
item.description: ZachXBT said the network of fake X accounts used AI to impersonate influencers and post sensational content, generating millions of views and six-figure profits from crypto scams.

item.title: Sweden’s H100 targets Norwegian firms in all-stock Bitcoin deal
item.description: H100 signed a letter of intent to acquire two Bitcoin treasury companies and their BTC holdings, which could make it the second-largest Bitcoin treasury company in Europe.

item.title: Fed's Miran speaks, Bitgo earnings, Casper hard fork: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 23.

item.title: Prosecutors flag mail discrepancies in Sam Bankman-Fried’s retrial motion letter from prison
item.description: A letter attributed to the jailed FTX founder was shipped via FedEx and misidentified his prison, prompting prosecutors to question its authenticity

item.title: Gold just dipped below $4,100 for the first time since November 2025. Gold is now down -24% since the US-Iran war started 23 days ago. Safe-haven my ass. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5ZclhPbnVuUGhHcXpfNzFabVdpLXAxc2w3NnpvTTZkN3VnTTRLRjY3WVpvSWVFWC1ZRlZoS041TnRpSXFmN2lDanFRVUJpeUkyZ2ZmY1FoZlB5UFprMkE4?oc=5" target="_blank">Gold just dipped below $4,100 for the …

item.title: Bithumb seeks to reappoint CEO despite recent controversies: Report
item.description: Bithumb was reportedly given a six-month partial suspension by South Korea’s Financial Intelligence Unit for alleged anti-money laundering failures.

item.title: Resolv stablecoin crashes 70% as attacker extracts $25 million in ETH
item.description: The protocol holds $95 million in assets against $173 million in liabilities, leaving it functionally insolvent. USR is trading at $0.27, down 72% in a week.

item.title: Oil, silver trading is way more popular than XRP, solana on Hyperliquid
item.description: Traders on decentralized exchange Hyperliquid are increasingly favoring perpetual futures tied to commodities.

item.title: Global turmoil pushes uptake of decentralized messengers, social media
item.description: Bitchat saw a spike in downloads during protests in Madagascar, Nepal, Indonesia and Iran over the last year, and global unrest could see more cases like it.

item.title: CoinDCX Rebukes Fraud Allegations, Points to Impersonation Scam in Police Probe
item.description: One of India's largest crypto exchanges said the move is based on a coordinated fraud using fake CoinDCX identities.

item.title: What to Expect From This Week's House Committee on Tokenization
item.description: Lawmakers are expected to weigh steps toward on-chain securities, even as the bigger legal and investor risks remain unresolved.

item.title: Stocks start catching up with bitcoin’s earlier price crash to $60,000 as bond yields rise
item.description: Stocks look to be catching with BTC's earlier crash to nearly $60,000.

item.title: Hong Kong’s Boyaa Interactive eyes $70M crypto treasury expansion
item.description: Boyaa Interactive International is the 23rd-largest Bitcoin treasury and the third-largest in Asia, behind Japan’s Metaplanet and China’s Next Technology Holding.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg is building an AI agent to help run Meta
item.description: The Meta co-founder is reportedly working on a personal AI agent to bypass management layers as Meta pushes employees to adopt agentic tools.

item.title: JUST IN: THE CFTC AND SEC'S GUIDANCE CLARIFYING #BITCOIN AND CRYPTO LAW OFFICIALLY GOES INTO EFFECT TODAY 10 YEARS OF UNCERTAINTY ARE OFFICIALLY OVER ₿RAND NEW DAY 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9qaFkzV0o2R3RrcEFGZEQtMEJ4YTFXUk4zQlduVnR5YTdQMmdYQlpYUFRfZmxfWlUxbmxENUlpaXpxZ0hvck5IQmE5YWZYcEJpWms5U1FYYVhfQl9XTTAzcjB3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: THE CFTC AND SEC'S GUIDAN…

item.title: XRP drops 3.7% as break below $1.40 signals renewed downside risk
item.description: Traders are watching the $1.38–$1.40 zone after repeated failures to reclaim resistance.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $68,300 as gold crashes for a ninth day and Asian stocks drop
item.description: The Iran conflict's fourth week is breaking the traditional safe-haven playbook, with gold down to $4,360 and equities falling for a third consecutive session.

item.title: Crypto, stocks fall as oil whipsaws after Iran vows response to Trump threat
item.description: Bitcoin and Asian markets dropped on Monday as Iran escalated threats to strike critical infrastructure in the Gulf.

item.title: Agentic AI commerce may spell the end of internet ads: a16z Crypto
item.description: “The internet is civilization’s town square, and the economic contract is now obsolete,” wrote Sam Ragsdale on an a16z Crypto blog on Sunday.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried’s parents tell CNN no customer money was lost. FTX creditors see it differently.
item.description: FTX payouts tied to 2022 prices leave creditors short as parents press case for pardon on CNN's Smerconish.

item.title: South Korea crypto liquidity tumbles as stablecoin balances plunge 55% and stock buying rises
item.description: On-chain data shows a sharp drawdown in dollar-linked token holdings since July, with the latest wave triggered by won weakness.

item.title: According to monitoring by @ai_9684xtpa, address 0xa2F…bF85A deposited about 15,000 ETH to Coinbase minutes ago, worth approximately $30.97 million; the address is identified as an ETH OG that accumulated in 2016 at prices as low as $11.61, and if - x.com

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: Ethereum OG who received 172,700 $ETH for $2.2M a decade ago (now worth $356M) sold 15,002 $ETH for $30.97M. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFA4bWxUMGFmWERlaWtrV09lLUF0RjhpenZsX0ttaDVqV055X2tVUTIwbF9BTllocTNfcG82b05wQlhxd2I1QkVoclQ2OEZGcmNGemRpbmRYUmlRdG1QS1BYcHhNMlc?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: Ethereum OG who rece…

item.title: Michael Saylor hints at Bitcoin buy as Strategy’s stack slips 10% into the red
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin-holding company Strategy has already purchased more than $2.9 billion worth of the cryptocurrency this month.

item.title: Ethereum builder @thomasg_eth is also selling low and buying high $ETH. On March 3, he sold 12,131 $ETH($24.24M) at $1,998. Then, in the past week, he bought 10,209 $ETH($22.58M) back at an average price of $2,211. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… - x.com

item.title: NYSE exchanges remove options limits on 11 Bitcoin, Ether ETFs
item.description: Part of the approved rule changes allows institutions to trade the crypto ETFs as FLEX options, which offer customizable terms like non-standard strike prices and expiration dates.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Slides but Holds Up Better Than Stocks as Oil Shock Continues
item.description: Earlier deleveraging and continued institutional participation have helped keep Bitcoin more stable than other risk assets during the recent macro-driven selloff.

item.title: Banks push tokenized deposits as onchain cash race intensifies: Report
item.description: UK Finance said that tokenized deposits could play a “vital role” in a future multi-money system alongside other digital assets.

item.title: The Resolv Hack: How One Compromised Key Printed $23 Million
item.description: On March 22, 2026, the Resolv DeFi protocol became the latest example of how quickly things can unravel in DeFi… The post The Resolv Hack: How One Compromised Key Printed $23 Million appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: ⚡️ NOW: Polymarket traders give Bitcoin 61% odds of hitting $60K before $80K, up 5%. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5rS2pfaUtoWm9aMnNra1piMWZSeWlKOWNNNDNKRnNkR0xEQmN4ZGpYSlRwOExOVkpFYm9nUF9sRjY1RkFIUTJ5Q3RVQTZEM0xobkZrcklzQmNGV1R3SnJJNWI0SVI?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NOW: Polymarket traders give…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BTC and gold divergence reflects split between retail and central banks: Analyst
item.description: 21Shares’ macro chief says Bitcoin and gold are diverging as central bank demand drives gold, while retail adoption shapes BTC’s market behavior.

item.title: If one trader can force the outcome of a prediction market, it shouldn’t be tradable
item.description: By hosting manipulable contracts, prediction markets swap their long-term credibility for short-term engagement.

item.title: Scaramucci says BTC's 4-year cycle still in play, forecasts rise in Q4
item.description: Proponents of Bitcoin's four-year cycle theory say the price of BTC typically rises for three of the four years and declines in the final year.

item.title: Crypto liquidations near $400M as Bitcoin dips to $68K
item.description: Bitcoin fell over the weekend to set up another visit to "unreliable" support, but analysis flagged a new BTC price golden cross.

item.title: The SEC explains how it's viewing a crypto security: State of Crypto
item.description: Joint SEC-CFTC interpretive guidance outlines how the agencies will determine whether a cryptocurrency is a security.

item.title: Fidelity urges SEC to move further on crypto activity by broker-dealers
item.description: Fidelity called for updated reporting rules and clearer guidance on how decentralized platforms and alternative trading systems should operate under US law.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇮🇷 Iran is moving to charge up to $2M per tanker to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. The world’s most critical oil route... now a toll gate. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTFAxeU5jTFZfQXY5bVNDQUd4emtGX1pJZjVGbnR1SDZua0NmalpOX2tBYVlodVJUMzZpLUF4VXFITlJCbVZxdFJMOGg3WDFyTlM2LThRaDhpQ0g?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇮🇷 Iran is moving to charge up to…

item.title: Ethereum faces make-or-break moment in high-stakes balancing act as scaling, quantum and AI pressures mount
item.description: While upgrades have improved efficiency and lowered costs, the ecosystem faces deeper structural questions around fragmentation, security, and purpose, even as it continues prioritizing base-layer scaling.

item.title: Crypto Fans Share 2010 Gaming Memories Amid Bitcoin Regret - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE94S0F1RE5tTXpjS0NDVUszWmIwMmNsbWVzd0ZoSnBQNjYwRWQ3dGZ3UWxNQjR5eURzcV9xQThjbXpnMnN6NThFYXR1UVRVbUxpeVZmanJpZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Fans Share 2010 Gaming Memories Amid Bitc…

item.title: The genius and the danger of STRC: How Strategy’s new funding model bends so it doesn't break
item.description: Strategy's STRC has bitcoin a major bitcoin accumulation tool, but analysts warn the risks aren't as clear as the marketing makes them out to be.

item.title: BITCOIN SLUMPS AS WAR FEARS SHAKE CRYPTO Bitcoin fell below $69,000, hitting its lowest level since early March, as rising tensions between the U.S., Israel, and Iran rattled markets. The cryptocurrency is down about 20% since the conflict began, und - x.com

item.title: Gold falters as macro pressures build, bitcoin holds liquidity trend
item.description: Rising real rates and inflation risks weigh on gold, while bitcoin continues to consolidate.

item.title: Resolv says no assets lost as DeFi protocols respond to $24M USR exploit
item.description: USR issuer Resolv Labs says its collateral pool remains intact after an exploit on Sunday that minted 80 million unbacked tokens and drove the US dollar stablecoin as low as $0.14.

item.title: How AI Is Being Used to Clear Court Backlogs in LA
item.description: The Los Angeles Superior Court is pilot testing whether Learned Hand’s curated AI can help manage rising workloads.

item.title: Bitcoin risks 50% drop as BTC’s positive correlation with US stocks grows
item.description: Bitcoin’s 20-week rolling correlation with the S&P 500 has turned positive, a signal that has historically preceded major BTC price declines.

item.title: Coinbase-backed CoinDCX founders questioned in fraud case: Report
item.description: Indian crypto exchange CoinDCX says the fraud complaint is part of a wider impersonation scam, citing more than 1,200 fake sites using its brand.

item.title: 💥BULLISH: Bitcoin is rising even as on chain liquidity slows. Sellers are getting exhausted. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE13OWVhbTFYVnNmeUtUWmM3OXZnV2ZpTGdsVkZXS0p5X2VxbU1MRVpsZlRNSnNBM0ZMSV9KNlZYQ1NSR1czSlhtcmpES2NuNWllQy1JNEhncnlzNW5Ga1o1SFBR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BULLISH: Bitcoin is rising even …

item.title: XRP falls 3% as breakdown below $1.44 and bitcoin weakness caps recovery
item.description: Traders are watching support near $1.40 as repeated failures below $1.60 reinforce broader downtrend.

item.title: According to The Economic Times, CoinDCX, one of India’s largest crypto exchanges, said its co-founders Sumit Gupta and Neeraj Khandelwal were arrested by police in connection with a fraud case involving impersonation websites. The company said the FI - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin miners are losing $19,000 on every BTC produced as difficulty drops 7.8%
item.description: The average production cost was sitting at $88,000 per bitcoin in mid-March, according to Checkonchain's difficulty regression model.

item.title: Bitcoin drops below $69,200 as Trump gives 48-hour ultimatum on Iran power plants
item.description: BTC fell 2.2% as $299 million in liquidations hit crypto markets, with long positions accounting for 85% of the damage.

item.title: 🇧🇷 LATEST: Brazil's Finance Minister shelves crypto tax policy until after the country's October 2026 presidential elections. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE84QldobGR1MGs5N2g1c1FHS2ZYQjdOZmUyZlotbGoyRVgxbzNPLWZQNC1ad2ZtSUZIMHhlcS1nalkxcm5IT2JwNlBsREFkMEEzZE95QnBpcktjdlh6TUtVdW9nVXY?oc=5" target="_blank">🇧🇷 LATEST: Brazil's Finance M…
